title: 3D Placeable Food
description: Mod adding new cakes, placeable vanilla meals, pizzas, bowl-foods, vegetable and other interactive decorations.
body:
![3D Placeable Food](https://i.imgur.com/6rubLJk.png)

**3D Placeable Food** adds new cakes, cupcakes, placeable vanilla meals, pizzas, bowl-foods, and other interactive decorations.

All food and decorations can be crafted using in-game vanilla resources.
This mod contains versions for **Fabric**, **Forge**, and **NeoForge**.
All food and decorations are replaceable unless you start interacting with them.

**Requires Fabric API for Fabric versions**  
**JEI recommended**


## Shader Compatibility

Want to make your gameplay even more immersive?  
You can make the mod’s decorations and foods work nicely with shaders.

📄 **[Shader Compatibility Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1w9h7F7nJHcj-mPd8YVE6UlPCfm-vFRvF/view?usp=sharing)**


## 📖 Recipes & Performance Tips

Performance tips and all crafting recipes are available here:

🍽️ **[3D Placeable Food Recipes](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1axU0a9bnuPWEeSuIcWWaCtB8aL9ogAjE/view?usp=sharing)**



## 🌾 Compatibility

Playable with **Farmer’s Delight** and most other food mods.

---

### Please do not redistribute this mod, re-uploading it to other websites is not permitted.
You may include this mod in **modpacks** or **videos** with proper credit.

---
